title: Straat Museum
full_description: STRAAT is the museum for street art and graffiti. Located in a former 8,000m² ship shed at the NDSM shipyard in Amsterdam Noord, the museum features more than 160 gigantic murals created on-site by international artists from 32 nationalities. The collection is constantly growing — on weekends visitors may catch artists painting live. Upstairs, a gallery sells smaller works from the same artists. Reached via the free F4 ferry from Amsterdam Centraal.
ai_summary: Amsterdam's dedicated street art museum — a vast former shipyard warehouse in Amsterdam Noord housing 160+ monumental murals by artists from 32 countries, all painted directly on the walls. One of the most impressive art spaces in Europe.
